allow: Bash(sed -i "s|document\\.addEventListener\(''keydown'', e => { if \(e\\.key === ''Escape''\) document\\.querySelectorAll\(''\\.nav-item\\.open''\)\\.forEach\(i => i\\.classList\\.remove\(''open''\)\); }\);|document.addEventListener\(''keydown'', e => { if \(e.key === ''Escape''\) document.querySelectorAll\(''.nav-item.open''\).forEach\(i => i.classList.remove\(''open''\)\); }\);\\nwindow.addEventListener\(''pageshow'', e => { if \(e.persisted\) document.querySelectorAll\(''.nav-item.open''\).forEach\(i => i.classList.remove\(''open''\)\); }\);\\ndocument.addEventListener\(''visibilitychange'', \(\) => { if \(document.visibilityState === ''hidden''\) document.querySelectorAll\(''.nav-item.open''\).forEach\(i => i.classList.remove\(''open''\)\); }\);|g" "$f")
